title: Interlock Microswitch Compatible for Lamona 2-Tag 'New' Type Multi-Model Fitting Dishwasher Door. OPN: 1731980300
features: Universal Compatibility - Suitable for a range of dishwasher models requiring a 2-tag 'new' type door interlock microswitch.
Simple Replacement - Designed for straightforward installation without the need for specialist tools.
Essential Safety - Ensures your dishwasher door remains securely locked during operation.
Reliable Performance - Maintains consistent function for everyday dishwashing cycles.
Cost-Effective Solution - Ideal for restoring appliance safety and usability without replacing the entire unit.
description: Restore the safe and efficient operation of your dishwasher with this compatible 2-tag 'new' type door interlock microswitch for Lamona models. This essential replacement part is designed for quick installation and reliable performance, helping to maintain your appliance's safety features.
